<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava (`L`), so I must not move forward. The goal is at row 04 column D, and the safe route is to go down first. From facing right, turning clockwise will make me face down.
</thought>
<action>

</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down (`v`). The goal `O` is below and to the right at row 04 column D, but the cell directly below me at row 03 column B is safe. Moving forward is the best next step toward the goal and avoids the lava at column C.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

I am at row 03 column B facing down (`v`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D, which is one step down and two steps to the right. Directly ahead at row 04 column B is safe floor `.`, so moving forward keeps me away from lava and brings me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE

I am at row 04 column B facing down (`v`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D, so I need to move right eventually. First, I must turn to face right. From down to right, the correct rotation is counter-clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
